_comment: Claim Adjustment Reason Codes (CARC) + Remittance Advice Remark Codes (RARC)
_source: CMS / ASC X12 public lists — washingtonpublishing.com

4.description: The procedure code is inconsistent with the modifier used.

5.description: The procedure code/type of bill is inconsistent with the place of service.

6.description: The procedure/revenue code is inconsistent with the patient's age.

7.description: The procedure/revenue code is inconsistent with the patient's gender.

9.description: The diagnosis is inconsistent with the patient's age.

10.description: The diagnosis is inconsistent with the patient's gender.

11.description: The diagnosis is inconsistent with the procedure.

15.description: The authorization number is missing, invalid, or does not apply to the billed services.

16.description: Claim/service lacks information which is needed for adjudication.

22.description: This care may be covered by another payer per coordination of benefits.

29.description: The time limit for filing has expired.

31.description: Patient cannot be identified as our insured.

45.description: Charge exceeds fee schedule/maximum allowable or contracted/legislated fee arrangement.

50.description: These are non-covered services because this is not deemed a medical necessity by the payer.

51.description: These are non-covered services because this is a pre-existing condition.

55.description: Procedure/treatment is deemed experimental/investigational by the payer.

57.description: Payment adjusted because the procedure/service was not indicated/covered on day of service.

96.description: Non-covered charge(s). At least one Remark Code must be provided.

97.description: The benefit for this service is included in the payment/allowance for another service/procedure.

109.description: Claim not covered by this payer/contractor. You must send the claim to the correct payer/contractor.

119.description: Benefit maximum for this time period or occurrence has been reached.

139.description: Contracted funding agreement — Subscriber is employed by the provider of services.

151.description: Payment adjusted because the payer deems the information submitted does not support this many/frequency of services.

167.description: This (these) diagnosis(es) is (are) not covered, missing, or are invalid.

170.description: Payment is denied when performed/billed by this type of provider.

171.description: Payment is denied when performed/billed by this type of provider in this type of facility.

173.description: No authorization obtained for this admission.

176.description: Services not provided or authorized by designated/primary care provider.

177.description: Patient has not met the required eligibility, spend down, waiting, or residency requirements.

178.description: Patient has not met the required spend down requirements.

181.description: Procedure code was incorrect. This payment reflects the correct code.

204.description: This service/equipment/drug is not covered under the patient's current benefit plan.

222.description: Exceeds the contracted maximum number of hours/days/units per week or month or year.

236.description: This procedure or procedure/modifier combination is not compatible with another procedure or procedure/modifier combination provided on the same day according to the NCCI.

242.description: Services not provided by network/primary care providers.

243.description: Services not authorized by network/primary care providers.

246.description: This non-payable code is for required reporting only.

252.description: An attachment/other documentation is required to adjudicate this claim/service.

M86.description: Service denied because payment already made for same/similar procedure within set time frame.

MA01.description: If you do not agree with what we approved for these services, you may appeal our decision.

MA04.description: Secondary payment cannot be considered without the identity of or payment information from the primary payer.

MA83.description: Did not indicate whether Medicare is primary or secondary payer.

N115.description: This decision was based on a Local Coverage Determination (LCD).

N130.description: Consult plan benefit documents/guidelines for information about restrictions for this service.

N180.description: This item or service does not meet the criteria for the category under which it was billed.

N362.description: The number of Days or Units of Service exceeds our acceptable maximum.

N386.description: This decision was based on a National Coverage Determination (NCD).

N435.description: Resubmit this claim using only your National Provider Identifier (NPI).

N522.description: Procedure code and clinical indication do not match.

N630.description: Processed under DMEPOS — Competitive Bidding Program.

root_cause_map.197: Prior authorisation was absent or not obtained before service. Obtain retro-auth or submit clinical notes proving medical necessity.
root_cause_map.15: Authorization number missing or invalid. Verify auth number and resubmit, or obtain retro-authorization with clinical documentation.
root_cause_map.11: Diagnosis code is inconsistent with the billed procedure. Verify ICD-10-CM code specificity and link to correct procedure.
root_cause_map.16: Claim is missing required information. Review remittance advice for specific fields and resubmit with complete data.
root_cause_map.18: Duplicate claim detected. Verify claim was not already submitted or paid before resubmitting.
root_cause_map.50: Service deemed not medically necessary. Submit clinical documentation including physician notes, lab results, and treatment rationale.
root_cause_map.167: Diagnosis code invalid, missing, or not covered. Verify ICD-10-CM FY2026 code validity and specificity.
root_cause_map.29: Timely filing limit exceeded. Submit proof of timely filing (original submission confirmation) to appeal.
root_cause_map.97: Service bundled into payment for another procedure per CMS NCCI. Review NCCI edits and remove or modify conflicting code.
root_cause_map.236: NCCI conflict detected. One procedure is a component of another — remove the component code or apply appropriate modifier.
root_cause_map.4: Modifier inconsistent with procedure code. Review modifier usage guidelines and correct or remove the modifier.
root_cause_map.96: Non-covered service. Verify patient benefits and obtain Advance Beneficiary Notice (ABN) if applicable.
root_cause_map.204: Service not covered under current benefit plan. Verify plan year benefits and patient eligibility date.
